questions.question: John says we know we have passed from death to life because we do what?
questions.feedback: We know we have passed from death to life because we love each other.

questions.question: John says if our hearts do not condemn us, we have what before God?
questions.feedback: If our hearts do not condemn us, we have confidence before God.

questions.question: John says we should love not just with words but with actions and in truth.
questions.feedback: Let us not love with words or speech but with actions and in truth.

questions.question: See what great _____ the Father has lavished on us, that we should be called children of God!
questions.feedback: See what great love the Father has lavished on us — to be called children of God.

questions.question: No one who is born of God will continue to _____ because God's seed remains in them.
questions.feedback: No one born of God will continue to sin because God's seed remains in them.
